tools.name: Deep Memory
tools.oneLiner: A vocabulary-driven graph memory library for AI agents.
tools.description:
A vocabulary-driven graph memory library for AI agents. Give your AI structured, persistent memory that it can read, write, and traverse with zero friction.
AI agents working with knowledge graphs face a cold-start problem: before storing a single fact, they need to understand what entity types exist, what properties each type has, what relationship types connect them, and what constraints apply.
